---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement idea
labels: enhancement
---

## Proposal

Describe the feature or enhancement you would like to see implemented.

## Motivation

Explain the problem you are trying to solve or why the feature is needed.

## Expected Impact

Outline the benefits and the scope of user impact once the feature ships.

## Related Areas

- List the code areas affected (e.g., `apps/desktop`, `packages/ui`, `packages/types`, `scripts`, etc.).
- Note any translation, documentation, or release pipeline implications.

## Additional Considerations

Include design mocks, technical constraints, TODO items, or other helpful references.
